title: FMD - Both earbuds connected
scenario: Verify that when both earbuds are connected, the Osprey device is recognized as a single device on the map via Find My Device in the Lens app.
steps: 1. Open Lens app with Osprey device connected.
2. Tap on App Settings icon (hamburger icon).
expected: When both earbuds are connected, the Osprey device is recognized on the map as a single device (and the Tern device is also recognized as a single device).
